programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: After U.S. Navy sailor disappears in 68, the Navy claims he went AWOL; but his sister works for over 30 years to prove that he was really killed; DNA from a cigarette butt helps detectives to unravel a 20-year-old case of rape and murder.

programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.desc: Two gunmen abduct and assault a 16-year-old girl; a deer hunter drags himself up a dry creek bed after falling out of a tree and breaking both legs; a college student becomes a gunman's human shield.

programme.desc: A woman fights back when attacked in her home; A family survives shark infested waters; a restaurant manager is left for dead.

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome
programme.desc: Travel blogger Carla Stefaniak goes to Costa Rica to celebrate her 36th birthday, but when she is to arrive back home in Miami, her awaiting loved ones realize she never got on the plane; Carla's friends and family recount the search to find her.

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome
programme.desc: Rising social media influencer Alexis Murphy is on her way to a hair appointment, but never arrivea; her worried loved-ones know something was wrong; there's a crack in the case when gas station surveillance video reveals something truly bizarre.

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome
programme.desc: When mother-of-two Deanna Cook misses her daily call to her mom, her family worries that Deanna's stalker may have something to do with it; her family's 911 call falls on deaf ears, and they are forced to make a discovery.

programme.desc: First responders bring a combination of professionalism and passion for the job as they encounter a gunshot victim, a drug overdose, a reported strangulation, a seizure and a house party threatening to spin out of control.
